query:
WITH LatestChanges AS (
                SELECT *, 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY code ORDER BY [__$seqval] DESC) AS rn 
                FROM [cdc].[dbo_wcinfo_CT] 
                WHERE [__$operation] IN (1, 2, 4) AND __$start_lsn > 0x0
            )
            SELECT * FROM LatestChanges WHERE rn = 1
